name: libjcode-pm-perl
title: libjcode-pm-perl
summary: Perl extension interface to convert Japanese text
description:
Perl extension interface to convert Japanese text
Jcode.pm is a Perl module that handles various Japanese charsets.
It has all features available on jcode.pl PLUS
- Object-oriented approach on Japanese text handling
- mime header handling
- Unicode feature (UCS2 and UTF8)
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libjcode-pm-perl because Perl extension interface to convert Japanese text.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libjcode-pm-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libjcode-pm-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libjcode-pm-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
